narrative:
Grand Rapids Twp Park (precinct in Wood County) has 460 registered voters — a small sample, so the figures below carry meaningful statistical uncertainty. Republican-leaning voters make up 36.3% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 18.9%, a pronounced Republican lean of 17.4 percentage points.
